title: Creamy Tunisian Prawn Tagine
description: A romantic Tunisian dish featuring raw tiger prawns in a creamy sauce, this recipe is lacto-vegetarian-friendly and perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Melt the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat, then add the olive oil and swirl it around.
Add the chopped onion to the saucepan and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the ground cumin, paprika, and cayenne pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the heavy cream to the saucepan and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer, stirring occasionally, until it has thickened slightly.
Add the raw tiger prawns to the saucepan and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are pink and cooked through.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and season the sauce with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the creamy prawn tagine to a lazy-susan-spinner and serve hot, with the sauce spooned over the top of the prawns.
Place the lazy-susan-spinner over a bain-marie to keep the dish warm during serving.
